data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence does not provide confirmation of how the system determines priority between queue and online bookings when both are enabled. While the linked use case describes the ability to switch priorities, it lacks specific evidence demonstrating the deterministic behavior required for the admission modes. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the exploratory step explicitly calls for validation of this aspect.
gaps: No evidence confirming the deterministic priority/order when multiple admission modes are enabled.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
